author: NETWORG
name: Power Platform: Script Library
description: Creates a TypeScript web resource project with Rollup bundler (UMD output). Supports npm packages via ES module imports, bundled into a single .js file. Build with 'dotnet build' — the SDK runs npm install and rollup automatically, generates web resource data.xml, and packs it into the solution. CHAIN: Step 1 — create this project. Step 2 — add it as a project reference from the solution project ('dotnet add reference'). Step 3 — 'dotnet build' the solution (SDK auto-generates web resource). Step 4 — reference from forms via pp-form-event-handler (libraryName=prefix_name.js, functionName=prefix_name.ClassName.methodName) or from ribbon buttons via pp-ribbon-button (LibraryLogicalName=prefix_name).

PublisherPrefix.description: Use the same publisher prefix as defined in Other/Solution.xml of the solution where this web resource is introduced. Combined with LibraryName to form the web resource name and UMD namespace.

LibraryName.description: Library name without publisher prefix. Combined with PublisherPrefix to form the web resource name (prefix_name) and UMD namespace used for Dataverse form/button function references.
